features: 【50 LM Ultra Bright】–The solar fence lights outdoor garden offer brighter illumination for both the front and back yards than ever before, with each solar lights outdoor garden emitting a powerful 50 lumens of light. In the evening, it can brighten a wider area, enhancing visibility so you can enjoy outdoor time worry-free, whether playing with your kids or pets in the garden.

【Longer Lighting Time】The solar powered outdoor lights, when fully charged in 4-6 hours under sunlight, can sustain illumination for up to 10-12 hours. This outdoor solar wall lights is equipped with a larger 110*45mm monocrystalline silicon solar panel, ensuring higher charging efficiency with a conversion rate of 20%. (Friendly reminder: Please ensure the switch is turned on before charging.)

【Lens-Focused LEDs】–Each fence solar lights is equipped with two lens-focused LEDs, utilizing the principle of convex lenses to amplify light distribution. This design expands the illuminated area, highlights light transmission, and enhances brightness. Compared to solar wall light without lenses, it provides a brighter output while reducing the number of garden solar lights needed, ensuring you enjoy the same or even better lighting effects in the designated area as compared to other outside solar lights in the same space.

【8 Lighting Modes 】The solar fence lights outdoor garden offer 8 lighting modes:Cycle/natural light/red/green/blue/yellow green/ice blue/purple. Ideal for everyday illumination, brightening up your fence or yard. These 8 modes allow you to freely choose based on different occasions and personal preferences, customizing a unique lighting ambiance for your courtyard, garden, or fence, adding a touch of personalized radiance.

【IP65 Waterproof & Widely Use】Outdoor solar security lights are crafted from high-quality PC and ABS materials, boasting an IP65 waterproof rating. Durable in all weather conditions, they are suitable for various outdoor settings such as your fence, front yard, garden, patio, deck, stairs, windows, porch, balcony, or walls.

【Considerate Design & Easy to Install】HAMLITE's solar wall lights outdoor are meticulously designed to cleverly project light onto the backyard fence, infusing your outdoor space with abundant, gentle downward illumination. It is recommended to install the solar downlights outdoor at the highest edge of the wall to capture ample sunlight, and with just a few minutes, you can easily secure them using the provided screws or stickers. 24-hour customer service support ensures you enjoy using it without any troubles.
